stanzas:
Poi Vazhva Song Lyrics
Singer(s): Vijaynarain, Santhosh Narayanan
Lyrics: Vivek

Poi Vazhvaa
valiyae theervaa, illa
un vazhvil arththam undu. (2)

Mei unarum
munbae soarrvaa.
poru nee orunaal
puriyum endru.

indha veruma vidaadhaa
oru siragu neelaadhaa
siru parava ezhaadhaa
adhu kanava thodaadhaa

Poi Vazhvaa
valiyae theervaa, illa
un vazhvil arththam undu.

Mei unarum
munbae soarrvaa.
poru nee orunaal
puriyum endru.

Oh..
vettri oru muttru pulli
thozhvigalae sellum vali.

indha veruma vidaadhaa
oru siragu neelaadhaa
siru parava ezhaadhaa
adhu kanava thodaadhaa

un vazhvil arththam undu.

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Poi Vazhvaa?

The song conveys themes of hope and motivation, encouraging listeners to find meaning in their lives.

What is the context of this song in the movie Manithan?

This song is featured in a pivotal moment of the film, highlighting the protagonist's journey and determination.

Who are the singers and music director of Poi Vazhvaa?

The song is sung by Santhosh Narayanan and Vijaynarain, with music composed by Santhosh Narayanan.

When was Poi Vazhvaa released?

The song was published on April 8, 2016.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Poi Vazhvaa, the vibrant energy of the song reflects the protagonist's journey in Manithan. The lyrics, penned by Vivek, inspire listeners to embrace hope and motivation in their lives. With a captivating melody and dynamic vocals from Santhosh Narayanan and Vijaynarain, the song evokes feelings of determination and celebration. This track is perfect for uplifting moments and energizing gatherings.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Poi Vazhvaa from Manithan is an electrifying duet that showcases the dynamic collaboration between Santhosh Narayanan and Vijaynarain. With its upbeat tempo and motivational lyrics, this song is sure to energize listeners and elevate any celebration. Dive into the vibrant world of Tamil music with this captivating track that perfectly blends rhythm and emotion.
stanzaMeanings: Is there a big solution to the lies, or is there meaning in your life?
Before the truth, speak out. You will understand it one day.
Don't let this pain go away; a small bird flying in the blue sky is not just a dream.
The heart travels everywhere. It finds joy in every place.
Is the truth just a struggle?
Is there a big solution to the lies, or is there meaning in your life?
Before the truth, speak out. You will understand it one day.
Oh.. victory is a thorn that will tell the story.
Who is it for? There is no pain. You should listen closely.
Don't let this pain go away; a small bird flying in the blue sky is not just a dream.
The heart travels everywhere. It finds joy in every place.
Is the truth just a struggle?
Is there a big solution to the lies, or is there meaning in your life?
Before the truth, speak out. You will understand it one day.
